title: Open Horizon
description: A balanced approach for an exploration focussed modpack
body:
Open Horizon is a pack that strikes a perfect balance between beauty and performance. 
Dive into a world teeming with lush vegetation, adorable animals, and mouthwatering food options that'll satisfy the nature lovers and culinary enthusiasts in your group. 
But don't worry, we've got something for everyone – from the intricate machinery of Create to badass armor sets that'll make you feel like a true warrior.
This pack is all about having a blast with your mates while keeping that classic modded Minecraft feel. 
I've fine-tuned the gameplay to be challenging yet fair, so you can focus on exploring, building, and creating memories together. 
Whether you're into tech, adventures, or just want to build a cozy homestead, Open Horizon has got you covered
